description: Fix browser tool dispatch to correctly route to the right Chrome profile when multiple profiles are connected. Currently, browser_list_tabs returns tabs from all profiles with connectionId metadata, but all other browser tools (browser_get_tab_content, browser_screenshot_tab, browser_click_element, etc.) use dispatchToExtension() which can route to the wrong profile when getConnectionForTab() fails to find the tab in tabMapping (e.g., browser tabs are not tracked in tabMapping, only plugin tabs are). The fix: make getConnectionForTab also search a browser-tab-to-connection index populated by browser_list_tabs results, so subsequent browser tool calls route correctly. Add extensive E2E tests for cross-profile browser tool dispatch.

userStories.title: Index browser tab ownership by connection when browser_list_tabs runs
userStories.description: When browser_list_tabs dispatches to all connections and collects results, store a tabId→connectionId mapping on ServerState so that subsequent browser tool calls can look up which connection owns a given browser tab. getConnectionForTab currently only searches plugin tabMappings (conn.tabMapping), which don't include raw browser tabs. Browser tabs from browser.listTabs responses must be indexed separately.
acceptanceCriteria: ServerState has a browserTabOwnership map (Map<number, string>) mapping tabId to connectionId
After browser_list_tabs runs, the map contains entries for every tab returned from every connection
getConnectionForTab checks browserTabOwnership before falling back to getAnyConnection
The map is cleared and rebuilt on each browser_list_tabs call to avoid stale entries
When a connection disconnects, its entries are removed from the map

userStories.title: Add E2E tests for cross-profile browser tool dispatch
userStories.description: Add comprehensive E2E tests in multi-connection.e2e.ts that verify browser tools correctly route to the right connection when multiple profiles are connected. Test browser_get_tab_content, browser_screenshot_tab, browser_execute_script, browser_click_element, and browser_navigate_tab all route to the correct profile based on tabId.
acceptanceCriteria: Test: browser_get_tab_content with tabId from conn-alpha routes dispatch to conn-alpha (not conn-beta)
Test: browser_get_tab_content with tabId from conn-beta routes dispatch to conn-beta (not conn-alpha)
Test: browser_execute_script with tabId from conn-alpha routes correctly
Test: browser_navigate_tab with tabId from conn-alpha routes correctly
Test: browser tool with tabId not known to any connection falls back gracefully (no crash)
Test: after one connection disconnects, browser tools targeting the remaining connection's tabs still work
All tests use the raw WebSocket multi-connection pattern from existing multi-connection.e2e.ts tests
